column11:
Mobility Services Customer Experience Study

 You are invited to participate in our research on people's experiences using specific mobility services. This survey should take no more than 8 minutes to complete. Data collected will be treated confidentially and individual participants will not be identified at any stage. Data will be used for academic purposes only and likely outputs include academic publications and conference presentations. 
Please complete the statement below to give us your consent to use the data for this research. - I agree to take part in this survey
